name: Rye Bread and Sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the beef and hot sausage, and drain excess fat.
2. Melt the Velveeta cheese.
3. Mix the ground beef, sausage, and melted cheese together until well combined.
4. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
5. Spread the cooled mixture evenly on the rye bread.
6. Place the bread in a single layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Freeze for approximately 30 minutes, or until solid.
8. Transfer the frozen bread slices to plastic bags and store them in the freezer.
9. When ready to bake, preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
10. Bake the bread at 350°F for 15 minutes, or until heated through and thoroughly warmed.
Serve hot. Enjoy!
